purpose: test an adapter-only conditional residual under an explicit Stage-C field trust region

evaluation.condition_retention: coordinate, volume and shape typed distance to frozen Stage-C present branch
evaluation.oracle_cal: must be non-inferior to Stage-C before generated-side exposure

boundary: one-seed trust-region mechanism screen only; it cannot qualify tensor-conditioned free generation or F/RL
source_boundary: initialized from the qualified Stage-C checkpoint; only tensor_residual_adapter.active is trainable
qualification_boundary: no generated-side, tensor, F/RL or materials-discovery claim is unlocked by this protocol
objective: common-noise orbit mimic plus null retention and conditional Stage-C typed trust region
